title: First Army
content:
{{Top|leg|canon=1st Sector Army}} {{Otheruses|Azure}} {{Fleet |image=[[File:Anaxes.jpg]] |name=First Army
Azure Hammer Command |type= |founder= |founded=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |headquarter=[[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] |location=[[Imperial Center Oversector|Coruscant/Imperial Center Oversector]] |commander=*[[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]] *[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Osvald Teshik]]''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' |officers= |crew= |flagship=''[[Whelm]]'' |capital= |starfighters= |ground= |naval= |campaigns= |battles= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] }} The '''First Army''', also known as '''Azure Hammer Command''' or the '''[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] Sector Army''', was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and later [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sector Army/Legends|Sector Army]] tasked with defending of the [[Imperial Center Oversector|Coruscant sector]]. ==History== At its zenith, this mighty fleet boasted the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Whelm]]'' along with 57 other [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. Throughout the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] served as the fleet's primary command center. Azure Hammer Command, like all other forces in Sector Zero, was under control by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Osvald Teshik]]. Teshik's command was revoked after his failure to address the threat posed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'', which occured shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}} Despite the Grand Admiral's dismissal, Anaxes successfully fended off the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for numerous years. However, a few months preceding the Thrawn Crisis, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Osted Wermis]] surrendered the command's headquarters Anaxes to the New Republic.''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{Military-stub}} ==Sources== *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{SectorArmiesNav}} {{Interlang |de=Kommando Azure Hammer |es=Primer Ejército |tr=Birinci Ordu }} [[Category:Sector Armies|1]]
